revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Decrease%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Decrease%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE -->
{{high-use|21563}}
{{Tfluc-common-doc}}

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||

<!-- ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE -->

}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Direction-related icon templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
